content:
A quick in real life unboxing video of one of the blind badge merch boxes we were lucky to get. It was pretty fun to record this so hopefully it's fun for people to watch a little too <:Pollux_gift:1459081694148558943> 
https://youtu.be/VyAxwlLKB98

embeds.title: Morimens Badge Merchandise IRL Unboxing (Handcam)
embeds.description:
Just a short and sweet video recorded with my sister, showing what the special badges look like in real life! Thanks for taking the time to watch as always especially if you're usually just watching for guides. 

Note: This is NOT a sponsored video in any way, I don't have any affiliations with Brai
